headline: The world is installing clean energy faster than ever
meta_description: Renewable energy keeps breaking installation records year after year, with solar leading the fastest energy shift in history.
summary_short: Solar panels and wind turbines are being added at record pace every year — renewables now dominate all new power built worldwide.
body:
Quietly, year after year, humanity keeps breaking the same record: more renewable power added than ever before. Solar panels lead the surge, with wind close behind, and costs that keep falling as the technology spreads.

According to the International Energy Agency, the vast majority of all new electricity capacity built worldwide is now renewable. The energy transition is no longer a promise on paper: it is steel, glass and silicon going up on rooftops and hillsides from Vietnam to Texas, faster every single year.
